name: HubSpot MCP Server (Official)
what_it_does: Official HubSpot MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with HubSpot CRM — reading and creating contacts, companies, deals, tickets, and notes; querying pipeline state; and automating sales and marketing workflows.
use_cases: Reading and updating HubSpot contacts from sales automation agents
Querying deal pipeline state for revenue reporting agents
Creating tickets and notes from customer-facing agents
Enriching contact records with agent-gathered information
Querying company and contact associations for ABM agents
not_for: Teams using Salesforce, Pipedrive, or other CRMs
Email marketing campaigns (use HubSpot's marketing tools directly)
best_when: An agent needs to read from or write to HubSpot CRM — contact management, deal tracking, or customer support workflows.
avoid_when: You're using Salesforce or another CRM — use that platform's integration.

auth.notes: Private App access tokens with fine-grained scope selection. OAuth 2.0 for user-delegated access. Private Apps recommended for agent use — no token expiry, scopes are explicitly defined.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free CRM with unlimited contacts, 1M contacts storage
pricing.notes: Free CRM is genuinely feature-rich. API access included in all plans. Rate limits more generous on higher tiers.

performance.rate_limits: 100 req/10s for private apps; 150 req/10s for OAuth; well-documented

known_agent_gotchas: Rate limit headers (X-HubSpot-RateLimit-*) must be monitored by agents
HubSpot v1/v2/v3 APIs coexist — use v3 for all new agent integrations
Property names are lowercase with underscores — exact match required
Associations between objects require separate API calls
Search API has different pagination than standard APIs
Custom properties must be created before they can be written
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Private App tokens with fine-grained scopes are excellent — scope selection is one of the best in class. OAuth 2.0 available. SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR, HIPAA.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Private App tokens with fine-grained scopes are one of the best API security designs for CRM. SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR, HIPAA. Strong enterprise security.
